_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Describe the most likely cause of an error and recommend a list of possible solutions given the description of error or system crash.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to diagnose and resolve technical issues that span multiple system layers, tracing problems across application code, data pipelines, databases, networks, and infrastructure to identify and remediate root causes.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI TF domain. TF-A-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-K-006 (DQ, cosine: 0.423), TF-S-012 (TF, cosine: 0.421).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.9/10 (raw 0.491). Shared vocabulary: [system]. DCWF-only terms [cause, crash, describe, description, error, given] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, across, application, causes, code, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.850 (P=0.856, R=0.844). Balanced P/R — the 23-word DCWF element and 29-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (96.9%). "Describe the most likely cause of an error and recommend a list of possible solu" and "Ability to diagnose and resolve technical issues that span multiple system layer" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.515 ≈ STS 0.491 (gap 0.024). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [system] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.7%. Shared tokens: [system]. DCWF-only: [cause, crash, describe, description, error, given]. WIDAI-only: [ability, across, application, causes, code, data].
